summary:
VISION OF THE HEAVENLY PRAYER GROUP: Brandon describes a profound spiritual experience where he heard heavenly singing and witnessed his wife Diana reacting to a sweet divine fragrance. Brandon saw a spiritual portal resembling a cotton-candy cloud tunnel that led him to a heavenly scene. Under a massive, shadowless oak tree, Brandon observed a group of deceased prayer warriors sitting on a pastel patchwork quilt on vibrant green grass. The group included Sister Lucy in a wooden rocking chair, Brother Halverson, Jeanie Wilkerson, Rachel Teafatiller, and historical Pentecostal evangelist Maria Woodworth-Etter. God explained to Brandon that this heavenly group is actively interceding to assist Brandon and the earth with an impending global revival.

THE COMING AMERICAN REVIVAL AND HOT SPOTS: Brandon explains that a massive spiritual fire is destined to break out at the Living Word Church in Minnesota, spearheaded by the prayers of the heavenly intercessors. This revival will quickly spread across the United States as hot spots popping up unpredictably like popcorn in places like Branson, Tulsa, Fort Worth, Kentucky, Tennessee, Oregon, Washington, California, and Nevada. Brandon notes that God emphasized that the bluer the state, the greater the harvest, meaning highly liberal areas will witness unprecedented waves of salvation. Brandon asserts that religious institutions will not be able to control or corral this radical movement of the Holy Spirit.

CELESTIAL DISRUPTIONS AND ENVIRONMENTAL SHIFTS: Brandon warns of severe global cataclysms triggered by a massive asteroid and its accompanying debris field currently heading toward Earth. Brandon explains that scientists using the Lucifer telescope are tracking this planet-sized rock but hiding the truth from the public to prevent panic, while Chinese authorities are treating the threat with extreme gravity. This approaching celestial body will cause bizarre tidal shifts, disrupt the Earth's magnetic poles, alter the planet's rotation, confuse animal migration patterns, and damage agriculture. Brandon also foresees massive natural disasters, including earthquakes exceeding a 9.0 magnitude in multiple places and simultaneous volcanic eruptions.

GEOGRAPHIC JUDGMENTS AND FALSE DECEPTIONS: Brandon details specific global occurrences, pointing to severe water events and flooding in Venice, Italy, and volcanic activity in Rome. Brandon predicts that massive earthquakes in India and other parts of Asia will completely decimate pagan and Buddhist temples, paving the way for a powerful Christian revival in those regions. Furthermore, Brandon warns of a major demonic deception involving a giant UFO mother ship and smaller balls of light flying over the Vatican and Mayan temples, which the enemy will use to explain away the Rapture. Brandon explains that the Antichrist will subsequently rise, promising peace and advanced AI cures for major illnesses in exchange for worship on Fridays and the acceptance of a chip.

HEALTH PLAGUES AND THE ROLE OF THE GLORIOUS CHURCH: Brandon warns of a future engineered virus that will be far more potent than COVID, acting like a medieval black plague that affects humans, pets, and livestock alike. Brandon urges the church to rise up in spiritual authority rather than cowering in fear, promising divine protection for believers who dwell under the shadow of the Almighty. Brandon highlights that while certain biblical events in Matthew 24 cannot be stopped, believers can halt localized terrorist attacks and plots against churches through focused intercession.

SPIRITUAL PREPARATION AND FINANCIAL OUTPOURING: Brandon states that an acceleration of these global events will occur starting around Rosh Hashanah in September. During this period, Brandon reveals that God is releasing a window for financial outpouring to fund ministries and assist believers, urging prayers for Judge Torres to establish favorable cryptocurrency regulations. Brandon cautions against false prophets who deliver confusing, double-minded messages to please itching ears, reiterating that God's true prophetic voices will prioritize leading people to genuine repentance and salvation. Brandon urges everyone to stop playing church, repent of their sins, and get their hearts right with Jesus Christ immediately.
rawData: [July 27, 2025]-[Going over what the Lord showed me about the asteroid that’s coming]-[https://youtu.be/xUTlHLlBy_g]-[Hey, good morning family. Thank you for joining me today. Truly, I'm so glad you're here. You know, yesterday was a wow. I will forever be changed by what happened yesterday. And I know a lot of people, because they weren't seeing it and I was trying to describe what I was seeing, don't get it a lot. And the comment section kind of goes along with that. But today, I'm going to make it clear for you to let you understand what the Lord was showing me. We were just singing 'The Lord is here' like you saw, and all of a sudden I saw the Lord said, 'I'm here, Brandon.' And I heard Him so clear and I said, 'Oh, the Lord is here. The Lord is here. The presence of the Lord is filling my house.' And it was the glory. I could feel the glory. Diana was sitting on the other side of the camera yesterday. Braden was doing the editing, remember? She fell out and she was laying right here in the middle of the floor, and she was weeping before the Lord, but she started smelling the fragrance of the Father like she always does. When the presence of the Lord fills the room, Diana will smell this fragrance of the Lord and it smells like sweet honeysuckle and all these other things that she describes, and it's absolutely glorious. But I've never really smelled it, only glimpses. It will come and it fades away, and I can smell it, but it's never like it is for her. But all of a sudden, when I was telling you I was hearing somebody singing, people said, 'Oh, Brandon, you heard me singing.' No, I wasn't hearing something in the natural; I was hearing in the spirit. And all of a sudden, I heard them singing the song that I was singing: 'From glory to glory, He's changing us, changing us.' But it was multiple voices, and I froze. That's why I was—it freaked me out a little bit because I thought, 'Well, my goodness, Diana, you're singing, too.' But you know, she was laying down there, but it sounded like it was right here, right here, everywhere. And all of us: 'From glory to glory, He's changing us.' But I noticed one of the voices, and everybody goes, 'Who is Sister Lucy?' Her name is Lucy Harriott, I believe, is her name. She is a lady that used to pray as a prayer warrior. And she is the twin sister of Lynn Hammond, who has a church up in Minneapolis, Minnesota. And it's called Living Word Church. Living Word, I believe, is the church's name. And they have a great congregation. They're a spirit-filled church. They love the Lord and are really on fire. They're prayer warriors. They're a great prayer church. Her husband is Mimmon. And if you're not familiar with it, I'd encourage you to look them up. They're great people. So, I was hearing her when she used to be alive. I heard old tapes and old CDs and things from back in the day. And I remember her voice, and I went, 'Diana, that's Lucy. I hear Lucy.' And Diana knew who it was because we love to listen to her old stuff from when she was alive. She passed away, I believe it was 2010. Well, I could hear the voice of Lucy and I was like, 'What in the world is that?' because I knew it was her voice. And all of a sudden, I saw like this circle before my eye right here, right here. It went poof and it popped out. It looked like a tunnel that was in the spirit realm right before my face. And I could see the edges of this tunnel that looked like clouds, almost like you would see cotton candy. That's a good way to describe it. Like cotton candy—pink, purple cotton candy, fluffy, cloud-looking cotton candy. And it was on the walls of this tunnel. And as it went up, it had ridges. But as I kept looking through it, the tunnel started moving and my spiritual eyes were moving with it, and I could see. And all of a sudden, I went through the tunnel up to where it ended, and there was a light there. Everything was lit up. I'm going to tell you that there was no darkness at all. But the light became brighter, and I looked through the tunnel, and then I could hear them singing even louder: 'From glory to glory.' And I asked the Father, 'What is this?' He said, 'This is the great cloud of witnesses.' All of a sudden, I could see everything within probably a 20-foot radius. I could see this massive tree, a beautiful oak tree with beautiful leaves on it that had no darkness on them or shadows at all. The leaves were all different kinds of shades of green, but there was no darkness. Like, you know, when you see leaves on top of each other, there are shadows on there, but there were no shadows on this tree. And the wood was beautiful, vibrant wood on this tree trunk, okay? I saw green grass all around. That was the first thing I saw because the tree was the tallest. As I'm coming up through this, I could see the tree. But then I looked down, and as I'm coming up through this hole, this thing, whatever this was, this portal, I could see Lucy sitting in a rocking chair. And she had her head down like this, and she was rocking and she was praying. She was praying in this rocking chair. And then on the right side of her, right here, was Brother Halverson, who is another amazing prayer warrior in his time on the earth. He's no longer here either. And he was sitting next to her right here. And Brother Halverson was praying and he was saying, 'Minnesota, Minnesota.' And he was praying out Minnesota. And they were praying together about Minnesota. And I could hear them praying about Minnesota, and I'll get to that more in a minute. Jeanie Wilkerson, who is another major prayer warrior, was sitting next to Brother Halverson. On this side was Rachel Teafatiller, who is another amazing prayer warrior in the time back in the 1950s, 1940s. She was a prayer warrior at Collinsville where I go to church, and she went home to be with the Lord. She's praying next to Jeanie Wilkerson, who was friends with Kenneth E. Hagin and she prayed in the camp meetings and all kinds of stuff. She was a great prayer warrior, but they were so young. This was Jeanie Wilkerson, Rachel Teafatiller, and then Sister Woodworth-Etter. Sister, I know I probably butchered the lady's name, but Sister Woodworth-Etter was sitting next to Rachel Teafatiller. How I knew because I said, 'Lord, who is this lady with the double bun?' She had her hair up, big poofy Pentecostal hair, and it was a bun on top of a bun. And I thought, 'You never see that.' But she was wearing her hair as a bun on top of a bun, and she was very old-school Pentecostal looking—old-school. And I asked the Lord after—this is how I know. I was praying after it was over, after our prayer session, I said, 'Lord, what did you just show me? What was that?' He said, 'That's Sister Woodworth-Etter, Brandon. She's an elder. Go look her up.' So, I went and I had Diana—I said, 'Diana, would you look this name up? This is who the Lord said that other woman was, sitting next to Rachel Teafatiller.' And she looked, she goes, 'Oh my gosh.' Then there was another lady there, and I don't know who that was. I still don't. She was sitting, looking at Lucy, and I said, 'Lord, what are they doing? What are they doing?' after I could see all this stuff. But I don't say a lot of things that I'm saying, but I'm saying it in my spirit toward the Father, and you don't know I'm saying it because I'm talking to Him. And I said to Him, 'What are they doing?' He said to me, 'Brandon, this is a prayer group.' I'm like, 'A prayer group in heaven? Why are they praying?' He said, 'Brandon, they're praying on an assignment for the revival that's about to take place on the earth.' He said, 'They're assisting you. They're helping you.' I know the Bible says that Jesus is at the right hand making intercession for all of us, but I was like taken back by it because I was thinking, 'Is this biblical?' you know, because I don't know this in the Word, because I'm always questioning everything. But I know that as on earth, as it is in heaven, and that's the scripture that I'm going to go by, that they were praying in heaven and they're praying on the earth. And these people were praying. Were they crying? No. So I said, "Lord, what are they praying about?" And they were interceding for revival in Minnesota. I heard Brother Halverson kept praying for revival. And all of a sudden, Living Word Lynne Hammond's church—with Lucy as the head of the prayer group—she was sitting in a rocking chair. Now, I got to go back to this. What were the others sitting on? They were sitting on a patchwork quilt on top of the beautiful green grass. And each little square was purple and pastel colors. Beautiful pastel colors like Easter colors, beautiful Easter-like pastel spring colors. There was purple, blue, pink, and white, but it was all like these little squares. And there was a patchwork quilt. And on top of the purple squares, I could see beautiful little daisies with little white flowers with a yellow ring, a yellow little print on the inside of it. And they were all little bitty flowers on top of the beautiful purple squares. And on the blue squares were different things, but all the different flowers created a beautiful quilt that they were sitting on, praying. But at the corners of each of the squares where they joined together was a beautiful ribbon of yellow. A beautiful ribbon of yellow was at the corner of each four corners of all of the quilt pattern. It was like it ran up through, and I could see it, and at the edges was a beautiful embroidery of some kind of beautiful print that was around it, and it was so beautiful. But Lucy was sitting in a wooden rocking chair. It looked oak, and it was like an old one you would get at Cracker Barrel. You know, like if you're in America, we have a restaurant called Cracker Barrel, and they sell a wooden rocking chair that you sit on your porch with. And that's the kind of Southern rocking chair that it was. It's a real Southern thing. Wooden rocking chairs like this are what we have down in the South, and they sell them at Cracker Barrel and you can get them. That's the kind of wooden rocking chair Lucy was in. But she was at the edge of it. She wasn't leaning back in her chair; she was at the edge leaning forward, and Brother Halverson was leaning forward. And I could see Jeanie Wilkerson was leaning back, and the others, and they were all just interceding and praying for a revival in Minnesota. As they were praying, I could hear them saying Minnesota, praying for Lynne Hammond's church, which is Living Word, which I told you. And that's Lucy, her sister. But they were praying for this, right? And all of a sudden—I'm trying not to skip around—all of a sudden, I saw a massive fire break out inside of a Holy Ghost and fire—a wave of His glory hit that church. And the Lord spoke to me, and He said, "I visited this church in the '90s, Brandon." He said, "But this was with Lynne and her husband." And He said, "Brandon, I'm going to visit it with this new generation, and there will be a great move of My presence one more time on this church, and I will pour out My spirit, and there will be a mighty revival in Living Word as they were interceding for it." And I saw it like echo all throughout Minnesota, and people were getting born again by the tens of thousands. The glory is coming, folks. But He was showing me hot spots. And as it became on fire, it became like a brush fire; it started spreading out. It didn't stay there on that church; it started spreading out. And there was charred ground on the land like you see when the fires are moving. And every one of the—I call them hot spots. There was a hot spot when I was praying; I saw it in Branson and Tulsa and Fort Worth. But then I looked to the east, and I saw hot spots popping up all over the east, Kentucky, Tennessee, all over the place. And He said, "The bluer the state..." Many said, "What are you talking about, the bluer the state?" He said, "The bluer the state, Brandon, which is Democrat, it's liberals." He said, "The bluer the state, the greater the harvest." That's what He said. "The bluer the state, son, the more liberal it is, the greater the harvest. Don't look at it as this dark blue, because the darker blue it is, the greater the harvest." That's what the Father said. Because Minnesota is very blue, very liberal, and the Lord said, "The greater the blue, the greater the harvest." Hallelujah! I tell you, I saw it. And then I looked to the west, and there were those hot spots popping up all over the place. They were all in Oregon, they were all in Washington, they were all in California, they were in Nevada, and they were popping up. And this is what He told me. You remember when I told you about the popcorn? He said, "You don't know where the next revival is going to start. If you go heat up a pan, son, with some coconut oil in it, and you watch the pan, you don't know which one's going to pop next." He said, "That's the way this next revival is going to be. They're going to be popping all over the place." He goes, "Because you're not going to control it." A lot of people, when you have an Asbury or whatever, or a Brownsville or whatever, people try to control it after a while. "Well, you know, this is the way we should do it," and they try to limit God in how He's doing things. "Well, you know, it's getting out of hand. People are getting too radical; they're getting too noisy. So, we've got to kind of corral this." And the Lord said, "You're not going to corral what's about to happen with your Pharisee thinking. God is going to have His way." And I saw, as they were praying, their prayers—when we were praying together as a family—their prayers were rolling out of heaven, and they were popping me in the stomach. And I was groaning the prayer, and we were assisting each other in prayer for the nations, for revival around the world. And He said, "Brandon, you'll notice they won't get tired because they're not in their earthly body anymore. They're in their glorified body, so they can pray all the time. They don't go, 'I've got to take a break. We've got to have nighttime. We've got to go eat.' They were praying like there's no time. There's no time in heaven, do you understand? So, they're continually praying. They lose track of time because they're in the glory, and they were interceding for us to have revival, praying for us to have a glorious outpouring. And I'm telling you, they were assisting. And as they were praying, the glory was coming out of them, and it was coming on me. And that's what we were feeling in my house, and I could feel it bubbling up out of my spirit. I was underneath that presence all night long. I felt it; it was so strong, like a cloak. And the Lord kept showing me a cloak coming on me. I could see it. And I told Diana, I said, "Boy, it's increasing." He said, "Heaven and earth are about to collide with the greatest harvest of souls and the greatest demonstrations and manifestations of My glory that this world has ever seen before." In a 24-hour period, Brandon, we're at the point of no return. We're at that point. It's time to push. It's time to push. Do you understand what I'm trying to tell y'all? It's time. He said, "You're looking there at that thread, that thin thread. Remember that hair-thin thread when I said Adam's lease is coming up?" Do you understand? We're about to step over the water's edge. We're about to step over the waterfall. And the Lord told me, He said, "You are about to see something I longed for you to see." Why? Because there was a lease. There was Adam's time frame of a 6,000-year window. And we're about to step into the 7,000-year window with the seven-year tribulation and all the things that we're about to see. We're about to see some radical things—radical, amazing things with the Holy Ghost and fire like we've never seen before. We've seen glimpses. The Lord said, "You people have seen glimpses with Azusa, with Brownsville, with the Welsh revival." He said, "You have seen glimpses that lasted just for a window." "But Brandon, what I'm about to do will pale in comparison to what is about to happen in these last days." And I'm so excited about it. But then he said, "I have to give you a warning about the plague. I have to tell saints to stand and pray, and tell the people that I'm coming." And he talked about Psalm 91, and you all heard that. But then I saw an asteroid, and he was talking about this telescope called Lucifer, and then he called it Satan. And I thought, "This is a very demonic name." Of course, I'm not going to sit there and call it—I thought, "Am I hearing this right?" So Satan—this thing is called Devil—like, what is this? So I saw this telescope in the Arizona West, and it is a massive thing. I saw a lens on this thing that was ginormous. And as I was looking at this, I saw men talking in lab coats, like professors. I don't know how else to say this, but they were writing down, and they said, "The odds are in our favor. The odds are in our favor. It's unlikely that this will happen." China was involved, and they were communicating back and forth at what they were seeing coming, and China said, "This is going to hit. This is serious." But the people in America were like, "I don't know. I don't think so." But China was taking it seriously. They were freaking out. I could see the Chinese men, who were very educated men, calculating and talking back and forth, and they knew something serious was about to happen and we were not going to avert it. As I was looking over into outer space, I saw a massive rock headed toward Earth. And they said, "We are not telling them because it will cause panic. We will not tell them for it will cause panic, but the odds are more in our favor that it will not happen. It will miss." But it will not. I saw another debris field, space debris, by this major rock. There was a whole bunch of them. This was not a small piece of rock; this was a massive piece of rock—planet-sized, like a massive-looking rock, huge. And the one that was beside it was smaller, but then the ones that they would consider "planet killers" were all behind it, like bunches of them. And as this thing was moving, all these others looked like a debris field behind it. I could see a debris field, and the Lord said, "Watch the sun. Watch your tides, for things are going to change and change quickly. Your water and your waves, the way the tides come in and come out because of the moon—things are going to start to shift like you've never seen before. And your tides are going to start to act very strange, like you've never seen before." Tides were higher than average. They came in further than what they were supposed to, and when they went out, they went out further than what they were supposed to. I heard this and I could see it. Something was affecting the tides—this rock, something serious. The Lord said, "Watch the pressure on the earth, for a major volcano is about to erupt. But not only will it be one volcano, but it will be multiple all at the same time." I saw earthquakes more than 9.0—huge earthquakes in more than just one place. They happened in multiple places at the same time. He said, "I told you and I warned you that it would affect the sun's light, the way it shines upon the earth, for it will cause the birds to want to migrate differently. It will cause the animals to breed differently because there is confusion in nature. They won't know when to fly south for the winter or go north for the summer." Things were acting weird. Animals and creation were acting weird. He said, "Even your agriculture, your flowering, and your planting, and things like that, will even be thrown off with what's coming." I saw the magnetic earth. I saw the pole and the way the earth was shifting and moving differently, and even your daytime will be different. The way the earth spins will be different. And most people say, "Well, it's a flat earth." I'm not going to argue about this; for what I saw, it's a round earth. And I'm telling you, even the sun will look different in the days ahead. You need to hear me because this is what I saw. The Lord said, "Look at Venice, Italy." And I could see the water in the city acting weird, and there was flooding, and there was a rise of the tides, and there were water events—that's what I'm going to call them. Water events are about to take place in Italy that have never happened before because of what's happening with our earth. Watch Venice, Italy. The Lord said, "Watch Rome. Watch the volcano that's about to go off even in Europe." This will be an event that is not just in the Ring of Fire, but this will be a global event that starts taking place. Then I saw India, and the Lord said, "Look at India, for a lot of the pagan temples will be destroyed with earthquakes in the days ahead." I saw the glory of God coming in, and there was a major revival all throughout India, all throughout all of these places where there were monkeys. I saw monkeys on temples, old shrines completely decimated by earthquakes. I'm talking broken down like the walls of Jericho. Those walls of these temples were completely decimated, flattened like there was nothing left but rubble. And the Lord said, "I will bring in My presence, and I'm going to decimate those false gods and those false places of worship, and there will be a great revival throughout India." All throughout Asia, all throughout these places, I saw great Buddhist temples completely decimated by what's about to take place. They were shaken to the ground, and I thought, "That is really interesting," because I'm talking piles of rubble—piles of rubble for what's about to take place. A major distraction is about to take place. And I asked Him, "Lord, is this two flying saucers? Is this two alien ships?" This deceit that's about to take place is false. It is demonic spirits. There is no such thing as aliens—you need to hear me. But there are going to be things in the sky that are going to scare everybody in the days ahead because people are going to go, "Oh, no, ET really exists." No, it's fallen angels. It's demonic things. This is how they're going to explain away the rapture of the church. "Well, I don't believe in the rapture." I don't care what you believe; it's going to happen. And I'm telling you, by the Spirit of God, you need to get your house ready. If you're not on fire for Jesus, if your heart's not serving Jesus, today's your day. You need to get right with the Lord. What's about to take place in the days ahead, you're going to see this. You say, "Well, how long?" I don't know, I'm just here to warn you. I'm just here to warn you what's coming. I saw this major alien ship, and it flies over the Vatican, and it goes over the Mayan temples down in Mexico. And I said, "Lord, is there two of these?" because I keep praying about this. And He said, "No, it's just one." And that's what's going to make everybody freak out, because they're going to see it moving across the ocean. You understand? It's going to be something that's going to be on TV—balls of light moving across the ocean—and people are going to freak out in the days ahead. Then I saw little bitty ships coming out of this mother ship that were balls of light, and it wasn't a real ship. It was demonic-looking light that was traveling around, causing confusion in our skies. You say, "Brandon, that sounds way out there." Yeah, it is. It was way out there to me. I didn't even want to talk about it, but I'm instructed to. You say, "Well, Brandon, that sounds like you're on something." Well, no, folks, I'm just here to warn you. And as wild out there as it sounds, fearful sights you will see that will bring you to your knees. I'm here to warn you. The enemy is not playing fair with trying to deceive people with what's coming. He's going to throw all the curveballs he can to try to deceive the nations. When the antichrist steps on the scene and he says, "Hey, we have a solution for all the problems in the days ahead. Oh, I have peace. I'm going to bring peace. I'm going to bring in prosperity. I'm going to do all this, but all you have to do is bow your knee to me on Fridays. And you're going to have to get a chip. You're going to have to do all these things. But it's going to be a solution because we're going to take care of all this with AI. AI's got the cure to diseases. AI's got all this stuff. We're going to fix diabetes. We're going to fix cancer. We're going to fix autism. We're going to do all these things through AI with what I've got with the technology." And I'm telling you, if you just serve me on Fridays and you do all what I tell you to do, we're going to fix all your ailments. Watch. I'm telling you, they're going to get everybody hook, line, and sinker. "Oh, he's a nice guy. Don't you know he has the plan to help everybody?" It's coming. None of us will be here to see it—the ones that are believing believers that have their lamps full of oil. And the Lord told me, He said, "Pray. They're going to try to get another major virus in the days ahead." I saw a major virus, and the Lord said, "Raise up. Pray, church. Pray that the glorious church rises." And they're going to be looking at us: "Do you have a solution for this new virus?" And we don't need to be handling it like we did COVID. You can either hide in your church or hide in your house or whatever and be afraid of things, or we can be the glorious church and rise up and pray and take our authority over things. Last time, people were caught off guard in 2019. I heard it six months in advance that there was a major virus, but I didn't have a platform to warn everybody like I do now. And the Lord told me, "I'm giving you a window, Brandon, pray and tell them that they're going to try to do it again. But this time it will be COVID on steroids and it's going to be a whole different strain. It's a whole different thing." And I'm trying to warn you about this that they have a plan in the future. It's not that far off. But not only will it affect humans; I saw it affecting cattle. It will affect your pets. It will be something that—I saw dead dogs everywhere. I saw cattle dead everywhere, birds, everything, because it wasn't just about humans. It was about livestock, everything. And it was spreading through everything. And it was like a plague, like medieval times, like the Black Plague of death. It was awful. But for the glorious church, there was light in Goshen and it was dark in Egypt. And I'm telling you, in the household of faith, if you raise up, if you pray and you read your Bible and you know the Word, He said, "A thousand shall fall at your side and 10,000 at your right hand, but it will not come nigh you." I told the Lord, I said, "What things can we stop? What things can we stop?" "Terrorist attacks, you can stop. You can stop plots against churches. You can stop all these things." But He said, "You cannot stop Matthew 24, Brandon. Wars and rumors of wars... You can be at the right place at the right time and it won't affect you because you're My beloved. Be where I tell you to be and do what I tell you to do, and hear Me and keep in sync with Me all the time, and know nothing will come nigh you." Listen to me and listen again. Matthew 24 will take place: wars and rumors of wars, plagues, pestilence, earthquakes in diverse places, massive storms, all these things, seas and waves roaring, men's hearts failing them for fear, looking after those things coming on the earth. We're going to see things like we've never seen before because the Bible said we were going to see them. But there are certain things we can stop and there are certain things we can't. And I'm going to tell you, the things we can't stop, because they're going to happen, don't have to affect you. We're in this world, but we're not of this world, right? We're underneath the shadow of the Almighty. We're underneath His feathers, and underneath His pinions shall we trust. He's watching over me. Goodness and mercy are following me all the days of my life. I'll dwell in the house of the Lord forever. That doesn't say that we won't go through the valley of the shadow of death, but I will fear no evil, and His rod and His staff, they comfort me. He prepares a table before me in the presence of all my enemies. He told me He would take care of me, and I just believe with all my heart that He will. And that's where I want you all to be.
